source: checkpoint: best_gen0270.pt (gen 240 base + 20 gens d7 + 10 gens d8)
note: Resumes the previous Enhanced (gen 240) and adds a 30-gen finishing phase at asymmetric +2/0/-1 scoring, max-sigma 0.5, pop 30, quiescence on: gens 241-260 at depth 7, gens 261-270 at depth 8. At 150 games head-to-head (depth 6, random-opening 8, seed 42) gen 270 beats gen 240 by +9 tournament points (24W/15L/111D); decisive-game win rate 62%. Draw plateau is still large (111/150 = 74%) — this checkpoint incrementally improves play, not a qualitative jump. Gen 270 is statistically tied with the subsequent pop-50 gen 335 across 400 combined games, so the ship target was chosen on margin-vs-shipped rather than head-to-head vs alternate candidates. Final king weight K=1.47 (paper-init 2.0).
